1.0.1.0.fixed: - made sure only 1 instance of the behaviour is allowed on an object.

1.1.0.0.added: - Added ACEs for off-screen auto-wave lightweight mode (toggle) with debugger support.

- Added Enabled property to Properties
- Added ACE for Toggling whether Behaviour is enabled. (pauses if disabled)
- can also be toggled in the Debugger.
